name: primer-segmented-progress
title: Segmented Progress
author: Primer
description: Displays multiple labelled progress values as segments in one bounded track.

changes: Clamped finite progress and aria-valuenow inputs to 0 through 100 and normalized invalid inputs to zero.
Added a fallback fill color when the host does not define the requested Primer color token.
Added local fallback values for the three Primer track and radius tokens.
Scoped forced-color tokens to the component and forced each inline item fill variable to LinkText.

modifications.change: Clamped progress values and added a fallback for generated Primer fill tokens.
modifications.reason: Prevent visual and ARIA overflow from invalid caller values and render without a Primer theme provider.

modifications.change: Added track token fallbacks and scoped the forced-colors overrides to the component classes.
modifications.reason: Keep the CSS module portable while ensuring inline fill variables cannot defeat Windows forced colors.
